name: 002-open-document-viewer
plan:
---
title: 'Open document in viewer dialog'
description: 'Verify clicking a document row opens it in the inline viewer dialog without leaving /documents'
criticality: critical
scenario: standard
flow: 'Documents & Document Review'
---

# Test: Open document in viewer dialog

## Setup

Using scenario: `standard`.

## Steps

1. In the sidebar view switcher, click the Context view (the one right to the message icon)
2. In the context sidebar, click `Documents`
3. In the documents list, click the row for `Acme MSA - 2026 Renewal.docx`
4. Assert a modal dialog opens overlaying the documents list
5. Assert the dialog title shows `Acme MSA - 2026 Renewal.docx`
6. Assert an embedded viewer (an iframe or a Google Docs embed) is rendered inside the dialog body
7. Click the dialog close affordance (X button in the top-right of the dialog)
8. Assert the dialog is no longer visible

## Expected Result

The document opens inline in a viewer dialog over the documents page. Closing the dialog returns focus to the list.

name: 006-rename-document
plan:
---
title: 'Rename a document via the right-click context menu'
description: 'Verify a document can be renamed by right-clicking and choosing Rename, and the new name persists after reload'
criticality: critical
scenario: standard
flow: 'Documents & Document Review'
---

# Test: Rename a document via the right-click context menu

## Setup

Using scenario: `standard`.

## Steps

1. In the sidebar view switcher, click the Context view (the one right to the message icon)
2. In the context sidebar, click `Documents`
3. In the documents page toolbar, click the `All` tab to load the all-documents view
4. Locate the document `Globex NDA - v1.docx` in the list (drill into the `Matters/Globex NDA` folder if the view is hierarchical)
5. Right-click on the document `Globex NDA - v1.docx` to open the context menu
6. In the context menu, click `Rename`
7. Assert the document name becomes an editable text input pre-filled with `Globex NDA - v1.docx`
8. Clear the input and type `Globex NDA - v1 - renamed.docx`
9. Press `Enter` to commit
10. Assert a toast with the text `Document renamed` is visible
11. Assert the document name in the list now reads `Globex NDA - v1 - renamed.docx`
12. Reload the page
13. Switch back to the `Context` view and click `Documents` → `All` if needed after reload
14. Assert a document entry titled `Globex NDA - v1 - renamed.docx` is visible
15. Assert no document entry titled `Globex NDA - v1.docx` is visible

## Expected Result

The document is renamed via the right-click context menu, the toast confirms the save, and the new name persists after reloading.

name: 007-delete-document.md
plan:
---
title: 'Delete a document with confirmation'
description: 'Verify a document can be deleted after confirming a warning dialog'
criticality: critical
scenario: standard
flow: 'Documents & Document Review'
---

# Test: Delete a document with confirmation

## Setup

Using scenario: `standard`. Sign in as `{{admin_email}}`, go to `/documents`.

## Steps

1. Right click the row `Standard MSA Template.docx`
2. Click "Delete"
3. Click "Delete" / "Confirm"
4. Assert the row `Standard MSA Template.docx` is no longer visible
5. Refresh the page
6. Assert the row is still gone

## Expected Result

The document is removed and the deletion persists.

name: 011-search-documents
plan:
---
title: 'Search documents by name'
description: 'Verify the documents search input narrows the list to matching names'
criticality: high
scenario: standard
flow: 'Documents & Document Review'
---

# Test: Search documents by name

## Setup

Using scenario: `standard`. Sign in as `{{admin_email}}`, go to `/documents`.

## Steps

1. Type `Globex` into the search input
2. Assert the row `Globex NDA - v1.docx` is visible
3. Assert the row `Acme MSA - 2026 Renewal.docx` is not visible
4. Clear the search input
5. Assert all four seeded documents are visible again

## Expected Result

Search filters the list and clearing restores it.

name: 012-filter-by-type
plan:
---
title: 'Filter documents by content type'
description: 'Verify filtering by PDF shows only PDFs'
criticality: high
scenario: standard
flow: 'Documents & Document Review'
---

# Test: Filter documents by content type

## Setup

Using scenario: `standard`. Sign in as `{{admin_email}}`, go to `/documents`.

## Steps

1. Open the type filter control
2. Click the option `PDF`
3. Assert the row `Counterparty proposal - redlined.pdf` is visible
4. Assert the rows ending in `.docx` are not visible
5. Clear the filter
6. Assert all four documents are visible

## Expected Result

PDF filter narrows the list to PDFs only.

name: 013-rename-empty-validation
plan:
---
title: 'Rename with empty name silently discards the edit'
description: 'Verify submitting an empty name in the rename editor closes the editor and keeps the original name (no validation banner, no toast)'
criticality: high
scenario: standard
flow: 'Documents & Document Review'
---

# Test: Rename with empty name silently discards the edit

## Setup

Using scenario: `standard`.

## Steps

1. In the sidebar view switcher, click the Context view (the one right to the message icon)
2. In the context sidebar, click `Documents`
3. In the documents page toolbar, click the `All` tab
4. Locate the document `Acme MSA - 2026 Renewal.docx`
5. Right-click on `Acme MSA - 2026 Renewal.docx` to open the context menu
6. Click `Rename` in the context menu
7. Assert the document name becomes an editable text input pre-filled with `Acme MSA - 2026 Renewal.docx`
8. Clear the input so it is empty
9. Press `Enter`
10. Assert the input collapses back to a static name display
11. Assert no toast with the text `Document renamed` is shown
12. Assert no toast with the text `Error renaming` is shown
13. Assert the displayed document name is still `Acme MSA - 2026 Renewal.docx`

## Expected Result

Submitting an empty rename closes the editor silently — there is no validation message, no toast, and the original name is preserved.
